nodes.label: Server Architecture (Session, Match, Client Handler, Combat, Entry Point)
nodes.norm_label: server architecture (session, match, client handler, combat, entry point)

nodes.label: Volley-of-3 Combat System
nodes.rationale: Inspired by Burning Wheel Gold. Players secretly declare actions in volleys of 3, trying to predict and counter their opponent's moves. This creates a mind-game layer on top of the interaction matrix.

nodes.label: Server-Authoritative Architecture
nodes.rationale: Server is sole authority for combat resolution, health tracking, range, advantage, debuffs. Both clients receive identical results; client only handles presentation via screen reader. Prevents cheating and ensures consistency.

nodes.label: Screen Reader Accessibility Constraint
nodes.rationale: All UI must be screen-reader accessible via existing sr.speak() and sr.braille() functions. All menus use the existing Menu system with keyboard and gamepad support. No visual-only UI elements.

nodes.label: Burning Wheel Gold Design Inspiration
nodes.rationale: Volley-of-3 combat system directly inspired by Burning Wheel Gold. The secret action declaration and counter-prediction mind game is central to the combat design.

nodes.label: Test-Driven Development Approach
nodes.rationale: Implementation follows TDD: write tests first (RED phase), verify they fail, then implement code (GREEN phase). Each task brief includes test file before implementation file.
